---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is blocked or too expensive today?

## Proposed capability

Describe the command, report, or behavior you want.

## Why this belongs in project-brain

Explain why this fits the product instead of a one-off script or downstream tool.

## Acceptance signal

How would we know the feature is good enough?

## Related inspiration

Mention any upstream project, paper, or tool that influenced this idea.
